title: Movie Armor
body:
This resource pack replaces the default Minecraft armor sets with their cinematic versions from the Minecraft Movie. All textures have been redesigned to match the film’s style: more detailed materials, updated helmets, chestplates, leggings, and boots.

🔹 Iron Armor → Movie-style Iron (metallic shine, more realistic plates).
🔹 Diamond Armor → Movie-style Diamond (deep blue color, glowing effect).
🔹 Netherite Armor → Movie-style Netherite (dark metal with fiery highlights).
🔹 Golden Armor → Movie-style Gold (bright shine, cast plate texture).
🔹 Copper Armor → Movie-style Copper (oxidized details, rustic orange-green tones).

Compatibility: purely visual, does not affect item balance.
Perfect for: casual play, roleplay servers, and Minecraft Movie–style machinimas.
